prompt: Create a hyper-cinematic vertical portrait of a mysterious man standing confidently in the middle of an empty desert highway at night, directly in front of a matte black luxury sedan with its two amber LED headlights blazing toward the camera. The man is centered full-body, facing forward, wearing an all-black outfit: long tailored trench coat, black shirt, black trousers, and polished black boots; the coat hem moves slightly in the wind. Use a dramatic low-to-mid camera angle with strong symmetry, the road center line running beneath his feet and stretching into darkness behind the car. Surround the lower foreground with swirling orange dust, smoke, sparks, and gritty road particles illuminated by the headlights, while the background fades into a dark, foggy desert with sand shoulders on both sides and a single cold overhead streetlight glowing near the top of the frame. Make the mood intense, mysterious, and action-movie-like, with deep shadows, high contrast, warm orange headlight glow against cool blue-black night tones, realistic 35mm film grain, shallow atmospheric haze, and glossy reflections on the car hood. Preserve a clean vertical social-media composition, no extra people, no text, no watermark, highly detailed cinematic realism.
